summary: Backend-only testing for MySafe ingredient scanner. Created /app/backend/tests/test_mysafe_api.py (pytest, 21 test cases) covering auth (register/login/me + JWT validation), profile CRUD with free-tier limits, scan endpoint behaviour (unclear image rejected with HTTP 400 - NOT defaulting to 10/10), profile-filtered scan listing, and compare-endpoint free-tier gating. ALL 21 TESTS PASSED (100%). Gemini OCR call was actually executed (visible in LiteLLM logs) and the blank 1x1 PNG was correctly rejected as 'Image unclear' with status 400. No critical or minor bugs found.

minor.issue: passlib emits 'AttributeError: module bcrypt has no attribute __about__' warning on first hash/verify (bcrypt 4.x + passlib 1.7.x compat). Functionality unaffected; consider pinning bcrypt<4 or upgrading passlib.
Uses query parameters (scan1_id, scan2_id) instead of JSON body — works but inconsistent with other POST endpoints that take JSON payloads.
FastAPI HTTPBearer returns 403 (not 401) when Authorization header missing. Tests accept either; spec says 401.

action_items: (Optional) Pin bcrypt<4 or upgrade passlib to silence the bcrypt __about__ warning.
(Optional) Change /api/compare to take a JSON body for consistency with other POST endpoints.
(Optional) Add DELETE endpoints for profiles & scans (currently impossible to remove created data via API; cleanup uses direct MongoDB).
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET_KEY falls back to a hardcoded default ('your-secret-key-change-in-production') if env var missing — fine for dev, must be set in prod.
Free-tier human-profile limit only triggers when profile_type=='human' AND existing >=1. A premium-then-downgraded user with multiple existing profiles is not retro-limited (edge case, low priority).
score_with_ai falls back to score=5.0/'caution' on JSON parse failure or exception — better than defaulting to 10/10, good defensive behaviour.
Scan model stores full image_base64 in MongoDB — could bloat documents; consider GridFS or external storage at scale.
server.py is 564 lines — still manageable but approaching the 700-line split threshold; consider splitting into routers (auth, profiles, scans, compare) and a services module.
seed_data_creation: Each test run registers TEST_new_<timestamp>@mysafe.com user + 1 profile; session-scoped cleanup fixture deletes the user, their profiles and scans via direct MongoDB at end of session. Existing test@mysafe.com user from test_credentials.md is untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MySafe backend endpoints validated. Tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_mysafe_api.py — reusable. The 'unclear image' check (1x1 blank PNG) confirms the OCR pipeline correctly returns HTTP 400 instead of defaulting to 10/10. Real OCR with a legible ingredient image was not tested (would consume LLM quota). Gemini model id used: 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview'; Claude: 'claude-sonnet-4-6' — both invoked via emergentintegrations LiteLLM proxy and reachable (visible in backend logs).
